name: CityGolf Norwell
about: CityGolf Norwell is an indoor golf facility offering elite-level instruction, cutting-edge simulators, and year-round golf experiences. Located at 119 Washington Street, Norwell, MA, the venue is positioned as a premier destination for golfers seeking to improve their game without traditional outdoor constraints. The facility emphasizes professional coaching using PGA-certified instructors and state-of-the-art technology, including video swing analysis and real-time data feedback. CityGolf Norwell provides a comprehensive range of services tailored to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to low-handicap players, with a focus on measurable improvement and community engagement.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited PGA-certified instruction included in memberships
Access to premium golf simulators with real-time swing analysis
Year-round indoor play avoiding weather constraints
Proven 30% average handicap reduction for members
Flexible private event and corporate outing options

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor mentioned in tech section
Premium simulator brand mentioned in technology section

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs, though club fitting services are available at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not mentioned as permitted, and no on-site dining or bar services are advertised.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to complete 18 holes is not specified, but simulator sessions typically allow for flexible timing depending on the player's pace and goals.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, CityGolf Norwell offers junior golf programs and is designed to accommodate young golfers through PGA Junior League and youth instruction.
